name: Pad Thai
intro: version that you would fi nd in Thailand. This also means you won’t fi nd any soy sauce in the sauce.
method: Heat a wok over high heat and add the oil. Break the eggs into a bowl and beat gently with a fork, sea- soning with the fi sh sauce before adding to the hot wok.

Turn the heat to low, then cook the eggs until the bottom sets. Use a spoon or fork to fl uff the egg mix slightly as you go while making sure you do not overcook or, even worse, blacken them. They should be a uniform bright yellow color.
Add the oysters to the top after the bottom forms, making sure to continue moving the eggs to en- sure they don’t overcook.
Once the eggs are cooked through and the oysters warmed, transfer to a plate and garnish with chopped green onions and black pepper. The eggs should be slightly runny.
